consistency.casting_time_range_duration: Consistent. 1 minute casting time, Touch range, and 'Until dispelled or triggered' duration fit a high-level trap/ward spell.
consistency.components: The material component cost (at least 1,000 gp) is appropriate for a 7th-level spell.
consistency.trigger_mechanism: The description clearly outlines the highly customizable trigger and conditions, which is a hallmark of the Symbol spell.
consistency.effect_area: Consistent definition of the 60-foot radius sphere centered on the glyph upon activation.

quality.flavor_and_theme: High quality. The spell offers a variety of potent, thematic, and debilitating effects (Death, Fear, Insanity, etc.), making it extremely versatile for defense or tactical positioning.
quality.clarity: The description is very clear regarding placement, invisibility (DC check required), trigger customization, area of effect targeting rules (entering/ending turn in the sphere), and the individual effects.

mechanics.placement_restrictions: Good limitation on placement: surface area (10ft diameter max) or object (must remain within 10ft of casting location, otherwise it breaks).
mechanics.target_acquisition: The rule for targeting creatures entering or ending their turn within the sphere is standard for area-of-effect continuous spells (like *Spirit Guardians*), ensuring creatures who move into the danger zone are affected.

effects_summary.effect_notes: Significant damage potential for a level 7 spell, balanced by a save.
Inflicts disadvantage on attacks/checks and prevents meaningful communication. Strong battlefield control.
Standard, potent fear effect requiring movement away from the glyph.
Prevents any offensive action for 1 minute. Excellent non-damage control.
Total loss of player agency/control over the creature for 1 minute. Extremely powerful.
Incapacitated condition via pain. Very effective control.
Long duration but removable via damage, typical for high-level sleep effects.
Stunned condition for 1 minute is one of the strongest control effects in the game.

mechanics.class_availability: Appropriate distribution across Bard, Cleric, and Wizard, fitting its utility and defensive nature.

analysis.overall_assessment: Mechanically sound, high-quality documentation for a complex 7th-level spell. The versatility derived from choosing the effect, trigger, and creature specificity makes this spell exceptionally powerful and well-documented.
